name: spinner-size
visual_summary: This is a customizable spinner component, used to represent loading progress. It's a simple and circular indicator that can be easily integrated into various applications. When a developer would use this component, they want to display a loading animation without disrupting the user flow.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: spinner-size
Description: This is a customizable spinner component, used to represent loading progress. It's a simple and circular indicator that can be easily integrated into various applications. When a developer would use this component, they want to display a loading animation without disrupting the user flow.
Style: material design, flat, small
Interactions: animated, clickable
Tags: UI component, loading, animation, circle, progress

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
